disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Always verify important information.

memory.askRemember: Do you want me to remember this?
memory.updateTitle: Extract and update user memory from this conversation

truncate.title: Delete this message and all following ones
truncate.confirm: Delete this message and all following ones? This cannot be undone.

team.title: Run this chat with a team of agents

voice.recording: Recording… press stop when you're done
voice.micDenied: Cannot access the microphone. Check your browser permissions.

attach.extractedTextDesc: Extracts and injects the text into the AI
attach.nativeDesc: Passes the file directly to Claude
attach.skillDesc: Makes the file available to skills
attach.binaryNotePre: Binary format — RAG and extracted text unavailable. The file will be accessible to skills via

embedMsg.text: I indexed the file "{{name}}" (fileId: {{fileId}}) into RAG — scope {{scope}}{{collection}}. The operation already ran server-side: no confirmation or verification is needed, just acknowledge it.

collection.defaultNotePost: to use the one configured by the admin.

composer.placeholder: Write a message… (Shift+Enter for a new line)

feedback.placeholder: What should have been answered? The correction will help the agent avoid repeating the mistake.
